dropbox-blue.$description: Dropbox Blue — Primary text, link borders, icon strokes, heading type, outlined action borders — the single most defining chromatic element, used wherever the brand needs to speak

dropbox-light.$description: Dropbox Light — Soft surface washes, decorative icon accents, and secondary blue fields — a desaturated companion to Dropbox Blue for large background panels

sun-yellow.$description: Sun Yellow — Brand palette swatch, large color block panels, decorative fills

tangerine.$description: Tangerine — Brand palette swatch, full-bleed color block panels, accent fills

sky-cyan.$description: Sky Cyan — Brand palette swatch, full-bleed color block panels, illustration accent

lime.$description: Lime — Brand palette swatch, large color block panels, accent fills

coral.$description: Coral — Brand palette swatch, warm color block panels, accent surfaces

lavender.$description: Lavender — Brand palette swatch, soft color block panels, illustration accent

magenta.$description: Magenta — Brand palette swatch, deep accent panels, editorial accent

slate-navy.$description: Slate Navy — Brand palette swatch, dark accent panels, editorial contrast

ink.$description: Ink — Primary body text, hairline borders, structural dividers, nav type — the near-black workhorse of the grid system

paper.$description: Paper — Page canvas, card surfaces, reverse text on color blocks, background beneath the visible grid

graphite.$description: Graphite — Muted secondary text, subtle helper labels, low-emphasis borders

dbsharpgroteskvariable-vf.$description: Display and heading type — tight-tracked, geometric grotesque at heavy weights. The 0.80 line-height at 34px is a compression device for editorial taglines where lines almost touch, creating a block-of-text effect. Free substitute: Inter at 700, or Space Grotesk Bold.

atlasgrotesk-web.$description: Body copy, navigation labels, link text, button labels, and all utility type. Neutral grotesque at compact sizes — 14px at line-height 1.67 gives breathing room for readable paragraphs while 12px at 1.43 keeps metadata tight. Free substitute: Inter or Atlas Grotesk via Adobe Fonts.

paper-canvas.$description: Surface level 0: Base page background with visible grid lines printed on top

color-block-panels.$description: Surface level 1: Full-saturation color panels sitting on the grid as content blocks

elevated-grid-cells.$description: Surface level 2: White cells within the grid for reverse-type headlines
